title: adinandra formosana var. formosana
intro: Adinandra formosana var. formosana, also known as Formosan Adinandra, is a species of plant in the family Theaceae. It is a shrub native to Taiwan, traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing and immune system support. Herbal preparations of Adinandra formosana var. formosana can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
